positive: A stylish, highly stylized composition featuring a collection of abstract forest creatures—a glowing fox, a whimsical badger, and a graceful owl—interacting within a mystical, enchanted forest setting. The style should be modern bohemian illustration, combining detailed linework with flat, vibrant colors and soft gradients. Emphasize clean silhouettes and strong visual contrasts against a muted, earthy background palette (moss greens, terracotta browns, dusty blues). The composition should be perfectly centered and suitable for an all-over apparel print, with plenty of negative space to define the subjects. Volumetric lighting, crisp vector quality, hyper-detailed, fantasy illustration, maximalist design elements, designed for screen printing, highly marketable, centered composition, 300 DPI.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, poor anatomy, messy, extra limbs, disfigured, duplicate, noisy, cropped
